problem: Healthcare systems struggle to scale patient monitoring and care delivery while maintaining quality, particularly for chronic disease management and remote patient care across diverse populations.
solution: Comprehensive digital health platform enabling rapid development of health super apps, regulated Software as a Medical Device (SaMD), and remote patient monitoring (RPM) tools including virtual wards and hospital-at-home models. Features Huma Intelligence with AI-powered clinical productivity tools (Hi Nurse, Hi Studio, Hi Scribe). Supports nearly 100 million people worldwide across clinical trials, screening, diagnostics, and care pathways.
